items.name_cn:
🆕 25c handle bowling bag In stock❤️
Very soft lambskin material, excellent touch. Super soft and smooth to the touch🥰 even the chain handle is soft. Structured and not saggy, the leather has a matte finish🖤
Generous capacity, fits large phones📱 perfectly and Pro Max is also completely fine!! Plenty of space left, the weight is still very light after packing😎
Great for hand carry or crossbody/shoulder, very stylish🤩
A keyword to summarize it is: light and chic!
5300~
size:19×14×7cm

items.name_en: New Arrival 🌸M13263 Cherry. This Neverfull Medium handbag reinterprets the playful elements of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series with dynamic brushstrokes, placing the sweet cherry pattern on Monogram coated canvas, while the striking striped lining echoes the artist's signature color aesthetic. Calfskin trim completes the classic style. Detailed Features - 31* × 14 × 28cm.

New Arrival 🎉Bonnie🎉1BG628🎉🎉
This retro leather bag embodies a refined yet modern personality. The geometric silhouette features modern metal buckles and side laces. The long handle reflects a practical and casual attitude. Equipped with a detachable long shoulder strap for versatile styling, it offers ample capacity. Super practical 👍👍 A must-have for fashionistas. Get this retro tote home now 🎉🎉
